ddls:
CREATE TABLE "exchange_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange rate entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the exchange rate */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate of GNO to AUD */,
  "previous_day_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate of the previous day */,
  "change_amount" TEXT /* Change amount from the previous day */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage change from the previous day */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation time of the exchange rate entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update time of the exchange rate entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the exchange rate data */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the exchange rate is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change entry */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange rate entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., daily update, correction) */,
  "change_amount" TEXT /* Amount of change */,
  "change_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of change */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is an administrator or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange rate entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange rate entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., significant increase, significant decrease) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the alert has been read by the user or not */,
  "threshold" TEXT /* Threshold value that triggered the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES exchange_rates ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* User who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)
